title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a computer game.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Have you tried that new computer game yet? || Man: Yes, but I'm not sure I'll keep playing it. The story is interesting, and the pictures are amazing. [8]The problem is that each level takes so long to finish, and I don't have that much free time in the evenings[/8]. || Woman: That's why I prefer shorter games. || Woman: Anyway, I’ll let you know what happens, because it is one of those small things that seems easy until you have to deal with it yourself.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you tried that new computer game yet?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but I'm not sure I'll keep playing it. The story is interesting, and the pictures are amazing. The problem is that each level takes so long to finish, and I don't have that much free time in the evenings.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That's why I prefer shorter games.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Anyway, I’ll let you know what happens, because it is one of those small things that seems easy until you have to deal with it yourself.

questions.question: Why might the man stop playing the game?

options.B: The levels take too much time.

questions.explanation: He says each level takes a long time and he does not have much free time.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking about a wedding.
extracts.audio_script: Man: How was your cousin's wedding? || Woman: Lovely. The meal was good and the music was fun. I thought the hotel staff were a little serious at first, but they were helpful. [9]What I'll remember most is the beautiful garden where they took all the family photos[/9]. || Man: That sounds perfect for a summer wedding. || Woman: Still, I’m glad we talked about it, because it helps to hear another opinion before making a final decision about something like this.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How was your cousin's wedding?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Lovely. The meal was good and the music was fun. I thought the hotel staff were a little serious at first, but they were helpful. What I'll remember most is the beautiful garden where they took all the family photos.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds perfect for a summer wedding.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Still, I’m glad we talked about it, because it helps to hear another opinion before making a final decision about something like this.

questions.question: What impressed the woman most about the wedding?
questions.explanation: She says what she will remember most is the beautiful garden where the photos were taken.

extracts.context: You will hear two students talking about an exam.
extracts.audio_script: Man: How did the history exam go? || Woman: Better than I feared. The last question was difficult, but I answered everything. [10]I was really happy when I saw the topic of the first essay, because I'd revised that exact subject last night[/10]. || Man: Lucky you. I spent ages learning something that didn't come up. || Woman: I suppose it is a good lesson for next time, and at least I know what to check before I make any plans again.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How did the history exam go?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Better than I feared. The last question was difficult, but I answered everything. I was really happy when I saw the topic of the first essay, because I'd revised that exact subject last night.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Lucky you. I spent ages learning something that didn't come up.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I suppose it is a good lesson for next time, and at least I know what to check before I make any plans again.

questions.question: Why was the woman happy at the start of the exam?

options.A: She had studied the essay topic.
options.B: She finished all the questions early.
options.C: The final question was very easy.

questions.explanation: She says she was happy because she had revised the exact subject of the first essay.

extracts.context: You will hear a man talking about a swimming pool.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Did you go to the new swimming pool? || Man: Yes. The water was warm and the changing rooms were clean. It was busier than I expected, but that was okay. [11]I was disappointed that the café wasn't open yet, because I wanted something to eat after swimming[/11]. || Woman: Maybe they'll open it next month. || Woman: Anyway, it was useful to talk it through, because now the whole situation feels a bit clearer than it did before.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you go to the new swimming pool?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes. The water was warm and the changing rooms were clean. It was busier than I expected, but that was okay. I was disappointed that the café wasn't open yet, because I wanted something to eat after swimming.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Maybe they'll open it next month.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Anyway, it was useful to talk it through, because now the whole situation feels a bit clearer than it did before.

questions.question: What disappointed the man about the swimming pool?
questions.explanation: He says he was disappointed because the café was not open yet.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a book club.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Are you going back to the book club? || Man: I think so. The people were friendly, although I didn't know anyone before I went. The book they chose was quite long, but I enjoyed most of it. [12]What surprised me was how strongly everyone disagreed about the ending[/12]. || Woman: That probably made the discussion interesting. || Woman: I’ll remember that for the future, because small details like that can make a normal day much easier or much more difficult.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you going back to the book club?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I think so. The people were friendly, although I didn't know anyone before I went. The book they chose was quite long, but I enjoyed most of it. What surprised me was how strongly everyone disagreed about the ending.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That probably made the discussion interesting.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I’ll remember that for the future, because small details like that can make a normal day much easier or much more difficult.

questions.question: What surprised the man at the book club?

options.C: There were different opinions about the ending.

questions.explanation: He was surprised that everyone disagreed strongly about the ending.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking to a friend about a bus service.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Is the new bus service useful for you? || Woman: Very. It doesn't run late in the evening, which is a pity, and the ticket price has gone up a little. [13]But it stops right outside my office, so I don't have to walk from the station anymore[/13]. || Man: That must save you a lot of time. || Woman: That’s true. I think I know what to do now, and I’m glad I didn’t make the decision too quickly.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Is the new bus service useful for you?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Very. It doesn't run late in the evening, which is a pity, and the ticket price has gone up a little. But it stops right outside my office, so I don't have to walk from the station anymore.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That must save you a lot of time.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That’s true. I think I know what to do now, and I’m glad I didn’t make the decision too quickly.

questions.question: Why does the woman like the new bus service?

options.A: It stops very close to her workplace.
options.C: It runs late in the evening.

questions.explanation: She says the bus stops right outside her office, so she no longer has to walk from the station.
